title: Bridge Essay: Indoor nature exposure and influence on physiological stress markers.
concept: Biophilia, nature connectedness, neurobiophilia, environmental neuroscience.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Ecology/Animism** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Ecology/Animism — biophilia, nature connectedness, environmental neuroscience, neurobiophilia.
**Phase context:** Biophilia, nature connectedness, neurobiophilia, environmental neuroscience.

**Indoor nature exposure and influence on physiological stress markers.** — Int J Environ Health Res (2021). DOI: 10.1080/09603123.2019.1679357. PMID: 31625764. Spending time in nature is beneficial for stress reduction and recovery. Using the properties of biophilic design, this study examined the influence of a nature-based indoor environment on physiological stress systems. An experimental study was designed to assess the influence of indoor natural elements on autonomic activity (heart rate variability or HRV), self-reported environmental assessments.
